title: Record: 11L XSA-all + backoff 7-gram (mean val_bpb=0.9917)
body:
## Results

| Seed | val_bpb |
|------|---------|
| 42   | 0.9920  |
| 1337 | 0.9912  |
| 2024 | 0.9920  |
| **Mean** | **0.9917** |
| Std  | 0.0005  |

- Artifact: 13.99 MB
- Train: 600s on 8xH100 SXM
- Eval: ~150s

## Method

11-layer transformer with XSA-all, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, Value Residual, Gated Attention, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate. GPTQ-lite int6 + zstd-22. EMA(0.997) + Tight SWA + Late QAT.

Multi-order backoff n-gram eval cache: orders 2-7, highest-order-first fallback, fixed alpha=0.40, 4M buckets per order. Score-first, deterministic, no TTT.

- [x] 8xH100 SXM, train <=600s
- [x] Eval <=600s (150s)
- [x] Artifact <=16MB (13.99MB)
- [x] 3-seed validation (std 0.0005)
